chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2308 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8470/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.8471/2024 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 24.12.2024 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for the petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< At the very outset, when confronted with the legal position as to the appointment on deceased quota, learned counsel does not wish to press instant Constitutional Petition along with pending applications. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
